html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

The Howlitzer is a craftable Ranged Weapon exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. It can only be crafted while next to the Brightsmithy. It requires 1 filled Spark Ark, 3 Brightshade Husks, 3 Pure Brilliance, and 3 Moon Rocks to craft and cannot be prototyped.

The Howlitzer is a blowpipe, and shoots its ammunition in a similar manner to Darts. However, unlike Darts, this item is not consumed when used. Similar to Walter's Trusty Slingshot, the Howlitzer doesn't have a durability; it can be loaded with Hound's Teeth as the ammunition in the same manner as Walter's Slingshot Ammo. On each use, 1 Hound's Tooth is consumed, and it deals 34 physical damage + 34 Planar Damage to the target. Additionally, it deals 10% more damage to Shadow Aligned targets.

Tips

  • Due to its range, damage, and infinite uses as long as Hound's Teeth are available, this item is the best ranged weapon once obtained.
  • By the time this item becomes available, which is after the defeat of the Celestial Champion and Lunar Rift activation, the player should have has a large number of Hound's Teeth lying around in their base already, ready for use as the ammunition.
    • Even in the situation where there are no Hound's Teeth left, as the Spark Ark is given to the players by Wagstaff after killing one of each Crystal Deerclops, Armored Bearger, and Possessed Varg, players are guaranteed to have at least some Hound's Teeth for going after the Varg and its summoned Hounds.

Trivia

  • The Howlitzer was introduced in the Host of Horrors update.
  • On beta release prior to update 576123, the Howlitzer did not drop the Spark Ark when deconstructed.

Gallery

  • Howlitzer Dropped concept art from Rhymes with Play.

“Teeth? Doesn’t seem all that hygenic.”
–Wilson
“If only it shot flaming teeth.”
–Willow
“This use doggy teeth. Is not creepy at all.”
–Wolfgang
“Delivering sweet death from a distance.”
–Wendy
“THIS WILL DO NICELY”
–WX-78
“An improvised dental projectile device.”
–Wickerbottom
“Almost spits more teeth than a Montreal Canadien.”
–Woodie
“Houndstooth? Both deadly and debonair.”
–Maxwell
“A beautiful ranged weapön. Fit för a cöward.”
–Wigfrid
“We can shoot dog teeth!”
–Webber
“Les dents will make a dent!”
–Warly
“Toothy ptooey”
–Wormwood
“Shoots dog teeth? What will they think of next?”
–Winona
“A toothsome tooter shooter.”
–Wortox
“Awww, doggy teeth here!”
–Wurt
“Don't worry, Woby. Your teeth are safe.”
–Walter
“A toothy take on a timeless design.”
–Wanda

On each use, 1 Hound's Tooth is consumed, and it deals 34 physical damage + 34 Planar Damage to the target. Additionally, it deals 10% more damage to Shadow Aligned targets.

Due to its range, damage, and infinite uses as long as Hound's Teeth are available, this item is the best ranged weapon once obtained.
By the time this item becomes available, which is after the defeat of the Celestial Champion and Lunar Rift activation, the player should have has a large number of Hound's Teeth lying around in their base already, ready for use as the ammunition.
Even in the situation where there are no Hound's Teeth left, as the Spark Ark is given to the players by Wagstaff after killing one of each Crystal Deerclops, Armored Bearger, and Possessed Varg, players are guaranteed to have at least some Hound's Teeth for going after the Varg and its summoned Hounds.

The '''Howlitzer''' is a craftable [[Weapon#Ranged weapons|Ranged Weapon]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[From Beyond]]''. It can only be crafted while next to the [[Brightsmithy Filter|Brightsmithy]]. It requires 1 filled [[Spark Ark]], 3 [[Brightshade Husk]]s, 3 [[Pure Brilliance]], and 3 [[Moon Rock]]s to craft and cannot be prototyped.

The Howlitzer is a blowpipe, and shoots its ammunition in a similar manner to [[Dart]]s. However, unlike Darts, this item is not consumed when used. Similar to [[Walter]]'s [[Trusty Slingshot]], the Howlitzer doesn't have a durability; it can be loaded with [[Hound's Tooth|Hound's Teeth]] as the ammunition in the same manner as Walter's [[Slingshot Ammo]]. On each use, 1 Hound's Tooth is consumed, and it deals 34 physical damage + 34 [[Planar Damage]] to the target. Additionally, it deals 10% more damage to [[Shadow Aligned]] targets.

=={{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips==
*Due to its range, damage, and infinite uses as long as Hound's Teeth are available, this item is the best ranged weapon once obtained.
*By the time this item becomes available, which is after the defeat of the [[Celestial Champion]] and [[Lunar Rift]] activation, the player should have has a large number of Hound's Teeth lying around in their base already, ready for use as the ammunition.
**Even in the situation where there are no Hound's Teeth left, as the Spark Ark is given to the players by [[Grainy Transmission|Wagstaff]] after killing one of each [[Crystal Deerclops]], [[Armored Bearger]], and [[Possessed Varg]], players are guaranteed to have at least some Hound's Teeth for going after the Varg and its summoned [[Hound]]s.

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Howlitzer was introduced in the ''[[From Beyond#Host of Horrors|Host of Horrors]]'' update.
*On beta release prior to update 576123, the Howlitzer did not drop the Spark Ark when deconstructed.
